title: task
description: rust/lichen-embassy/src/sim.rs:152 - SNR received as i16 from protocol but truncated to i8 in RxPacket. While real LoRa SNR values are typically -20 to +10, edge cases (simulated extremes) could overflow. Should match protocol's i16 or validate range.
close_reason: Fixed: Clamp i16 SNR to i8 range before cast to prevent truncation
